Added_Other.purpose: Improves the overall fitting and appearance of accessories on player avatars.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates strings dynamically based on the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players have access to the latest features and fixes in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows dynamic updating of timestamp strings in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players see real-time updates for events or changes in the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how version information is retrieved from the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Speeds up the loading process for developers, making updates more efficient.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are displayed in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and speed of displaying time-related information.

Added_Physics.name: FFlagHumanoidParentNil_Staged
Added_Physics.mechanism: Allows humanoid objects to function without a parent object.
Added_Physics.purpose: Increases flexibility in character design and scripting.
